sqlMap.insert: insert into Firm(PolicyKey ContactPerson ContactPhone IsFirmRenderingServices IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity TotalFirmPersonnel IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired IsReducedNumberOfOwners IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns IsPriorAct IsFullPriorAct PriorActDate IsPolicyExcludesCoverage RetroDate RetroFirmName PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA IsCommissionRecieved IsPublicTradedAudited IsServedAsTrustee IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone PublicPrivateFirmName PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience IsInvestmentVenture IsDebtOrEquityFinancing IsManagementServiceProvided IsNonPublicInvestmentDone IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved CurrentValueNmc ClientNameNmc ClientIndustryNmcKey ServiceIndustryNmcKey MergedOrNumberComment IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService IsSuitInstituted AgainstHowManyClients IsSignedEngagement IsControlClientFunds IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst Email OtherLargestClientIndustry OtherLargestServiceIndustry OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years RegulatoryInquiryExaplain RegulatoryInquiryComment IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment ReasonForDecline ReasonForDeclineComment IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures IsSyndicationManagers IsQuickQuoteByEmail IsAnAgentCall ContactPhoneExt IsRatingDone IsBasicPage IsGeneralPage IsSupplementPage IsClientTerminated IsAnyDeclination IsPolicyProhibiting IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument IsAttesationPage IsComputerServicePage OtherITServiceComment IsBusinessFundPage IsPracriceMangPage ServiceIndustryofLargestClient ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient FirstReviewUserID ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers LicenseNumber IsQuotePage ) values (#PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ContactPerson# #ContactPhone# #IsFirmRenderingServices# #IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity# #TotalFirmPersonnel# #IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired# #IsReducedNumberOfOwners# #IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns# #IsPriorAct# #IsFullPriorAct# #PriorActDate# #IsPolicyExcludesCoverage# #RetroDate# #RetroFirmName# #PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient# #PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient# #ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient# #ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient# #ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient# #ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient# #IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA# #IsCommissionRecieved# #IsPublicTradedAudited# #IsServedAsTrustee# #IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone# #PublicPrivateFirmName# #PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience# #IsInvestmentVenture# #IsDebtOrEquityFinancing# #IsManagementServiceProvided# #IsNonPublicInvestmentDone# #IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient# #IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved# #CurrentValueNmc# #ClientNameNmc# #ClientIndustryNmcKey# #ServiceIndustryNmcKey# #MergedOrNumberComment# #IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService# #IsSuitInstituted# #AgainstHowManyClients# #IsSignedEngagement# #IsControlClientFunds# #IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry# #IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability# #IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst# #Email# #OtherLargestClientIndustry# #OtherLargestServiceIndustry# #OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient# #OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent# #IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years# #RegulatoryInquiryExaplain# #RegulatoryInquiryComment# #IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment# #ReasonForDecline# #ReasonForDeclineComment# #IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures# #IsSyndicationManagers# #IsQuickQuoteByEmail# #IsAnAgentCall# #ContactPhoneExt# #IsRatingDone# #IsBasicPage# #IsGeneralPage# #IsSupplementPage# #IsClientTerminated# #IsAnyDeclination# #IsPolicyProhibiting# #IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument# #IsAttesationPage# #IsComputerServicePage# #OtherITServiceComment# #IsBusinessFundPage# #IsPracriceMangPage# #ServiceIndustryofLargestClient# #ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient# #FirstReviewUserID# #ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers# #ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers# #LicenseNumber# #IsQuotePage# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('Firm') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmRenderingServices, IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity, TotalFirmPersonnel, IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired, IsReducedNumberOfOwners, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPriorAct, IsFullPriorAct, PriorActDate, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, RetroDate, RetroFirmName, PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient, PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA, IsCommissionRecieved, IsPublicTradedAudited, IsServedAsTrustee, IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone, PublicPrivateFirmName, PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience, IsInvestmentVenture, IsDebtOrEquityFinancing, IsManagementServiceProvided, IsNonPublicInvestmentDone, IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient, IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved, CurrentValueNmc, ClientNameNmc, ClientIndustryNmcKey, ServiceIndustryNmcKey, MergedOrNumberComment, IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService, IsSuitInstituted, AgainstHowManyClients, IsSignedEngagement, IsControlClientFunds, IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry, IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability, IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst, Email, OtherLargestClientIndustry, OtherLargestServiceIndustry, OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient, OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent, IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years, RegulatoryInquiryExaplain, RegulatoryInquiryComment, IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment, ReasonForDecline, ReasonForDeclineComment, IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures, IsSyndicationManagers, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall, ContactPhoneExt, IsRatingDone, IsBasicPage, IsGeneralPage, IsSupplementPage, IsClientTerminated, IsAnyDeclination, IsPolicyProhibiting, IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument, IsAttesationPage, IsComputerServicePage, OtherITServiceComment, IsBusinessFundPage, IsPracriceMangPage, ServiceIndustryofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient, FirstReviewUserID, VersionSequence, ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers, LicenseNumber, IsQuotePage, PolicyKey from Firm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update Firm set
ContactPerson = #ContactPerson# ContactPerson = null ContactPhone = #ContactPhone# ContactPhone = null IsFirmRenderingServices = #IsFirmRenderingServices# IsFirmRenderingServices = null IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity = #IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity# IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity = null TotalFirmPersonnel = #TotalFirmPersonnel# TotalFirmPersonnel = null IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired = #IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired# IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired = null IsReducedNumberOfOwners = #IsReducedNumberOfOwners# IsReducedNumberOfOwners = null IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns = #IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns# IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns = null IsPriorAct = #IsPriorAct# IsPriorAct = null IsFullPriorAct = #IsFullPriorAct# IsFullPriorAct = null PriorActDate = #PriorActDate# PriorActDate = null IsPolicyExcludesCoverage = #IsPolicyExcludesCoverage# IsPolicyExcludesCoverage = null RetroDate = #RetroDate# RetroDate = null RetroFirmName = #RetroFirmName# RetroFirmName = null PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient = #PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient# PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient = null PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient = #PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient# PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient = null ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient = #ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient# ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient = null ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient = #ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient# ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient = null ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient = #ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient# ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient = null ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient = #ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient# ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient = null IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA = #IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA# IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA = null IsCommissionRecieved = #IsCommissionRecieved# IsCommissionRecieved = null IsPublicTradedAudited = #IsPublicTradedAudited# IsPublicTradedAudited = null IsServedAsTrustee = #IsServedAsTrustee# IsServedAsTrustee = null IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone = #IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone# IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone = null PublicPrivateFirmName = #PublicPrivateFirmName# PublicPrivateFirmName = null PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience = #PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience# PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience = null IsInvestmentVenture = #IsInvestmentVenture# IsInvestmentVenture = null IsDebtOrEquityFinancing = #IsDebtOrEquityFinancing# IsDebtOrEquityFinancing = null IsManagementServiceProvided = #IsManagementServiceProvided# IsManagementServiceProvided = null IsNonPublicInvestmentDone = #IsNonPublicInvestmentDone# IsNonPublicInvestmentDone = null IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient = #IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient# IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient = null IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved = #IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved# IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved = null CurrentValueNmc = #CurrentValueNmc# CurrentValueNmc = null ClientNameNmc = #ClientNameNmc# ClientNameNmc = null ClientIndustryNmcKey = #ClientIndustryNmcKey# ClientIndustryNmcKey = null ServiceIndustryNmcKey = #ServiceIndustryNmcKey# ServiceIndustryNmcKey = null MergedOrNumberComment = #MergedOrNumberComment# MergedOrNumberComment = null IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService = #IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService# IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService = null IsSuitInstituted = #IsSuitInstituted# IsSuitInstituted = null AgainstHowManyClients = #AgainstHowManyClients# AgainstHowManyClients = null IsSignedEngagement = #IsSignedEngagement# IsSignedEngagement = null IsControlClientFunds = #IsControlClientFunds# IsControlClientFunds = null IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry = #IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry# IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry = null IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability = #IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability# IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability = null IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst = #IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst# IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst = null Email = #Email# Email = null OtherLargestClientIndustry = #OtherLargestClientIndustry# OtherLargestClientIndustry = null OtherLargestServiceIndustry = #OtherLargestServiceIndustry# OtherLargestServiceIndustry = null OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient = #OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient# OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient = null OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient = #OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient# OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent = #IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent# IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent = null IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years = #IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years# IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years = null RegulatoryInquiryExaplain = #RegulatoryInquiryExaplain# RegulatoryInquiryExaplain = null RegulatoryInquiryComment = #RegulatoryInquiryComment# RegulatoryInquiryComment = null IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment = #IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment# IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment = null ReasonForDecline = #ReasonForDecline# ReasonForDecline = null ReasonForDeclineComment = #ReasonForDeclineComment# ReasonForDeclineComment = null IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures = #IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures# IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures = null IsSyndicationManagers = #IsSyndicationManagers# IsSyndicationManagers = null IsQuickQuoteByEmail = #IsQuickQuoteByEmail# IsQuickQuoteByEmail = null IsAnAgentCall = #IsAnAgentCall# IsAnAgentCall = null ContactPhoneExt = #ContactPhoneExt# ContactPhoneExt = null IsRatingDone = #IsRatingDone# IsRatingDone = null IsBasicPage = #IsBasicPage# IsBasicPage = null IsGeneralPage = #IsGeneralPage# IsGeneralPage = null IsSupplementPage = #IsSupplementPage# IsSupplementPage = null IsClientTerminated = #IsClientTerminated# IsClientTerminated = null IsAnyDeclination = #IsAnyDeclination# IsAnyDeclination = null IsPolicyProhibiting = #IsPolicyProhibiting# IsPolicyProhibiting = null IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument = #IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument# IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument = null IsAttesationPage = #IsAttesationPage# IsAttesationPage = null IsComputerServicePage = #IsComputerServicePage# IsComputerServicePage = null OtherITServiceComment = #OtherITServiceComment# OtherITServiceComment = null IsBusinessFundPage = #IsBusinessFundPage# IsBusinessFundPage = null IsPracriceMangPage = #IsPracriceMangPage# IsPracriceMangPage = null ServiceIndustryofLargestClient = #ServiceIndustryofLargestClient# ServiceIndustryofLargestClient = null ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient = #ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient# ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient = null FirstReviewUserID = #FirstReviewUserID# FirstReviewUserID = null ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers = #ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers# ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers = null ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers = #ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers# ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers = null LicenseNumber = #LicenseNumber# LicenseNumber = null IsQuotePage = #IsQuotePage# IsQuotePage = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from Firm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmRenderingServices, IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity, TotalFirmPersonnel, IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired, IsReducedNumberOfOwners, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPriorAct, IsFullPriorAct, PriorActDate, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, RetroDate, RetroFirmName, PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient, PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA, IsCommissionRecieved, IsPublicTradedAudited, IsServedAsTrustee, IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone, PublicPrivateFirmName, PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience, IsInvestmentVenture, OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent, IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years, RegulatoryInquiryExaplain, RegulatoryInquiryComment, IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment, ReasonForDecline, ReasonForDeclineComment, IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures, IsSyndicationManagers, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall, ContactPhoneExt, IsRatingDone, IsBasicPage, IsGeneralPage, IsSupplementPage, IsClientTerminated, IsAnyDeclination, IsPolicyProhibiting, IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument, IsAttesationPage, IsComputerServicePage, OtherITServiceComment, IsBusinessFundPage, IsPracriceMangPage, ServiceIndustryofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient, FirstReviewUserID, VersionSequence, ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers, LicenseNumber, IsQuotePage, PolicyKey from Firm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ContactPerson, ContactPhone, IsFirmRenderingServices, IsCoverageIncludedForThisEntity, TotalFirmPersonnel, IsAnyFirmMeargedOrAcquired, IsReducedNumberOfOwners, IsFirmCarryingProfLiabilityIns, IsPriorAct, IsFullPriorAct, PriorActDate, IsPolicyExcludesCoverage, RetroDate, RetroFirmName, PercentOfRevenueFromLargestClient, PercentOfRevenueFromSecondLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofLargestClient, ClientIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryIDofSecondLargestClient, IsQualityReviewOfferedByAICPA, IsCommissionRecieved, IsPublicTradedAudited, IsServedAsTrustee, IsPublicPrivateOfferingsDone, PublicPrivateFirmName, PublicPrivateYearsOfExperience, IsInvestmentVenture, IsDebtOrEquityFinancing, IsManagementServiceProvided, IsNonPublicInvestmentDone, IsFirmRenderedServiceForAnyClient, IsNonMonetaryCompensationRecieved, CurrentValueNmc, ClientNameNmc, ClientIndustryNmcKey, ServiceIndustryNmcKey, MergedOrNumberComment, IsFirmRenderedAuditOrAttestService, IsSuitInstituted, AgainstHowManyClients, IsSignedEngagement, IsControlClientFunds, IsAnyRegulatoryInquiry, IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiability, IsAwarenessOfAnyProfLiabilitySuitAgainst, Email, OtherLargestClientIndustry, OtherLargestServiceIndustry, OtherClientIndSecondLargestClient, OtherServiceIndSecondLargestClient, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsFirmsRevenueMorethan25Percent, IsFirmAttendedRiskMagtSeminarIn3Years, RegulatoryInquiryExaplain, RegulatoryInquiryComment, IsFirmDeclinedOtherthanNonPayment, ReasonForDecline, ReasonForDeclineComment, IsPredecessorsOrInvestVentures, IsSyndicationManagers, IsQuickQuoteByEmail, IsAnAgentCall, ContactPhoneExt, IsRatingDone, IsBasicPage, IsGeneralPage, IsSupplementPage, IsClientTerminated, IsAnyDeclination, IsPolicyProhibiting, IsWrittenAnyQualityControlDocument, IsAttesationPage, IsComputerServicePage, OtherITServiceComment, IsBusinessFundPage, IsPracriceMangPage, ServiceIndustryofLargestClient, ServiceIndustryofSecondLargestClient, FirstReviewUserID, ClientIndustryNmcKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryNmcKeyOthers, LicenseNumber, IsQuotePage from Firm where PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
